div1.entryFree:
Impartial, 1) not favouring one party more than another, equitable, just: R2 I, 1, 115. H4B V, 2, 36. H4B V, 2, 36
2) indifferent, not taking part: favour, savour, hue and qualities, whereat the i. gazer late did wonder, Ven. 748. in this I'll be i.; be you judge of your own cause, Meas. V, 166.
